parameters.name: query.cond
parameters.value: cancer OR oncology OR carcinoma OR lymphoma OR leukemia OR melanoma OR glioblastoma

parameters.name: term
parameters.value: oncology[MeSH] AND (clinical trial[pt] OR phase III[tiab]) AND (2025[pdat] OR 2026[pdat])

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO signals (
  source_id,
  source,
  title,
  sponsor,
  drug_name,
  key_drug,
  key_indication,
  impact_level,
  impact_score,
  score_breakdown,
  scoring_version,
  is_urgent,
  signal_type,
  competitor_flag,
  ai_summary,
  recommended_action,
  url,
  version,
  first_seen_at,
  last_seen_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ ($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.sponsor || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.drug_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.key_drug || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.key_indication || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.impact_level || 'LOW' }}',
  {{ $json.impact_score || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.score_breakdown || '{}' }}',
  {{ $json.scoring_version || 1 }},
  {{ $json.is_urgent || false }},
  '{{ $json.signal_type || 'unknown' }}',
  {{ $json.competitor_flag || false }},
  '{{ ($json.ai_summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.recommended_action || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url || '' }}',
  {{ $json.version || 1 }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (source_id) DO UPDATE SET
  impact_level       = EXCLUDED.impact_level,
  impact_score       = EXCLUDED.impact_score,
  score_breakdown    = EXCLUDED.score_breakdown::jsonb,
  scoring_version    = EXCLUDED.scoring_version,
  is_urgent          = EXCLUDED.is_urgent,
  signal_type        = EXCLUDED.signal_type,
  competitor_flag    = EXCLUDED.competitor_flag,
  ai_summary         = EXCLUDED.ai_summary,
  recommended_action = EXCLUDED.recommended_action,
  url                = EXCLUDED.url,
  version            = signals.version + 1,
  last_seen_at       = NOW();
